pokemon:lilligant.name: Lilligant
pokemon:lilligant.summary: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect, but taking care of it is very difficult.
I suspect that its well-developed legs are the result of a life spent on mountains covered in deep snow. The scent it exudes from its flower crown heartens those in proximity.
As soon as it finds a male to be its partner, the beautiful flower on its head darkens, droops, and withers away.
The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.
Essential oils made from Lilligant flowers have a sublime scent, but they’re also staggeringly expensive.
No matter how much time and money is spent raising it, its flowers are the most beautiful when they bloom in the wild.
It’s believed that even first-rate gardeners have a hard time getting the flower on a Lilligant’s head to bloom.
It’s well liked by other Pokémon because of its beauty. The flower on its head needs constant care, or it will soon wither and rot.
The fragrance of its flower differs slightly depending on the soil where it grew up. Sniffing the aroma calms your heart and mind.
The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.
The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect, but taking care of it is very difficult.
The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.
Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

pokemon:petilil.name: Petilil
pokemon:petilil.summary: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.
The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
The leaves on its head grow right back even if they fall out. These bitter leaves refresh those who eat them.
The leaves on its head are highly valued for medicinal purposes. Dry the leaves in the sun, boil them, and then drink the bitter decoction for remarkably effective relief from fatigue.
By pruning the leaves on its head with regularity, this Pokémon can be grown into a fine plump shape.
The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
The deeper the color of a Petilil’s leaves, the healthier the Pokémon is. Petilil sometimes makes its home in a well-tended field or flowerbed.
Although the leaves on its head are bitter enough to cause dizziness, they provide relief from weariness—even more so when boiled.
Petilil appears around sources of clean water. Boiling leaves from this Pokémon’s head results in a liquid that’s sometimes used as a bug repellent.
They prefer clean water and soil. When the environment they live in turns bad, the whole bunch will up and move to a new area.
Some say if you dry the leaves on its head, boil them down, and drink the infusion, your vigor will return, so Petilil is popular with the elderly.
Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.
The leaves on its head grow right back even if they fall out. These bitter leaves refresh those who eat them.
The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.

loreSummary: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.
